expected_behavior: Known rows migrate deterministically; unknown/ambiguous rows are quarantined or block migration; no ownerless global truth is created.
given: Existing local/scaffold records or imported archive rows are migrated to the VS2 schema.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Migration report with counts/checksums, quarantine reasons, rollback transcript.
then: Known rows migrate deterministically; unknown/ambiguous rows are quarantined or block migration; no ownerless global truth is created.
verification_method: Migration tests on clean, mixed, malformed, duplicate, and rollback fixtures.
when: A row has known, missing, ambiguous, or invalid tenant/namespace ownership.
